title: Pellionia yosiei
taxonomy: Pellionia yosiei is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. It belongs to the genus Pellionia, which comprises a group of tropical plants native to Asia. The species is known to be endemic to Japan and is often found in shaded areas and on rocky slopes. Pellionia yosiei is classified as a species of Pellionia, a genus within the Urticaceae family. Its classification is consistent with other species within the same genus, exhibiting similar characteristics and growth habits.

intro: Pellionia yosiei is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae, commonly known as a type of nettle or a pellionia. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce oxidative stress.
